_notes: Central driver registry for the Juniper Design imaging server.
Models are keyed by a normalized slug derived from WMI Win32_ComputerSystem.Model.
driverPath is relative to C:\deploy\drivers\ on pc-deploy (\\192.168.5.141\deploy$\drivers\).
wmiModels lists exact strings returned by Win32_ComputerSystem.Model — add variants if WMI differs across BIOS revisions.
To add a new model: populate wmiModels, driverPath, vendorUrl, then run 09-update-driver-warehouse.ps1 to verify.
Driver packs should be extracted (not ZIPs) so DISM /Add-Driver /Recurse can find .inf files directly.

dell-latitude-5440.driverPackNotes: Download 'Driver Pack' CAB from Dell's driver page, extract with: expand -F:* DriverPack.cab C:\deploy\drivers\Dell\Latitude-5440\

dell-latitude-5540.driverPackNotes: Download 'Driver Pack' CAB from Dell's driver page, extract with: expand -F:* DriverPack.cab C:\deploy\drivers\Dell\Latitude-5540\

dell-optiplex-7010.driverPackNotes: Download 'Driver Pack' CAB from Dell's driver page.

dell-optiplex-7020.driverPackNotes: Download 'Driver Pack' CAB from Dell's driver page.

hp-elitebook-840-g9.driverPackNotes: Download the 'HP Driver Pack' .exe, extract with: HPDriverPack.exe /e /s /f C:\deploy\drivers\HP\EliteBook-840-G9\

wmiModels: HP ProDesk 400 G9 Desktop Mini PC
hp-prodesk-400-g9.driverPackNotes: Download the 'HP Driver Pack' .exe and extract.

lenovo-thinkpad-t14-gen4.driverPackNotes: Download the SCCM/WinPE driver pack ZIP from Lenovo, extract to the driverPath folder.
lenovo-thinkpad-t14-gen4.notes: Lenovo model strings in WMI are sometimes the MTM code (e.g. 21HD) — add both to wmiModels.
